items.title: Dueling Victory Day ceasefires for war in Ukraine collapse almost immediately
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hungary's new PM to be sworn in during 'regime change' party
items.dek: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.
items.body: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Anger and resignation in Tenerife as hantavirus ship approaches
items.dek: Some on the Spanish island worry that the imminent arrival of the MV Hondius could pose a health risk.
items.body: Some on the Spanish island worry that the imminent arrival of the MV Hondius could pose a health risk.
items.author: IriLine Desk
